scenarios.title: navigates to the practice site and verifies it renders @positive @e2e
scenarios.userAction: Open the Selenium WebDriver practice site home page and confirm the main heading is visible.
expectedAssertions: After navigation: the page's main heading is visible (exact heading text TBD — see Q3 in plan)

locatorTable.notes: Mechanical URL → relative path translation; baseURL set to 'https://bonigarcia.dev' via process.env.BASE_URL in playwright.config.ts (see Q4 in plan).
Source asserts file existence only — not a UI assertion. Migration must add a user-perceivable assertion. Heading text and element type unknown without DOM inspection; see pin 1 and Q1, Q3 in plan.

hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q3 unresolved: heading element type and text not confirmed from DOM inspection — source only asserted screenshot file existence.
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: Inspect DOM at https://bonigarcia.dev/selenium-webdriver-java/ and replace with page.getByRole('heading', { name: '<exact text>', level: 1 }) or supply a data-testid.
